name: Soprocal, Calerias e Industrias S.A.
summary: Soprocal, Caler√É¬≠as e Industrias S.A. produces and sells lime in Chile. The company offers hydrated lime, hydraulic lime, and agricultural lime products. It provides its products for the agriculture, building, industrial, environmental, and mining sectors. The company was founded in 1940 and is based in Santiago, Chile. Soprocal, Caler√É¬≠as e Industrias S.A. is a subsidiary of Inversiones La Tirana Ltda.
